title: Daughter of the Dragon
writer: Lloyd Corrigan, Monte M. Katterjohn, Sax Rohmer
actors: Anna May Wong, Warner Oland, Sessue Hayakawa
plot: Princess Ling Moy, a young and beautiful Chinese aristocrat lives next door, unbeknownst to her, to Dr. Fu Manchu, a brilliant but twisted genius who is out to rule the world. She is involved with Ah Kee, a handsome young man, who...
